# What is DevOps

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

DevOps
======

DevOps is a continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD) service that automates the delivery and deployment of software to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) compute platforms.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/devops/)

#### Get Started

[Video: Overview](https://apexapps.oracle.com/pls/apex/f?p=44785:265:0:::265:P265_CONTENT_ID:32478)

[Learn about DevOps](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/devops_overview.htm "The Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) DevOps service is an end-to-end, continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) platform for developers.")

[Get started with DevOps](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/getting_started.htm "Learn how to get started with the DevOps service, and the prerequisites for using it.")

[DevOps IAM policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/devops_iampolicies.htm#policy-examples "DevOps policies required for using various DevOps resources such as code repositories, build pipelines and deployment pipelines.")

[DevOps examples](https://github.com/oracle-devrel/oci-devops-examples)

#### Manage Environments

[Create environments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/environments.htm "An DevOps environment is the target platform for your software. You create references to different destination environments for DevOps deployment.")

[Update environments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_environment.htm "Update the details of an environment, such as its name and description.")

[Delete environments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/delete_environment.htm "Delete an environment in the DevOps service.")

#### Manage Artifacts

[Create artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/artifacts.htm "DevOps artifacts are referenced in a pipeline stage for automated deployment to the target environment. They are used to specify software package versions for deployment.")

[Update artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_artifact.htm "Update the reference information of an artifact.")

[Delete artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/delete_artifact.htm "Remove an artifact reference in the DevOps service.")

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Manage DevOps Projects

[Create projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/create_project.htm "Create a DevOps project to group the resources required to implement a CI/CD workflow.")

[Update projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_project.htm "Modify the information of a DevOps project.")

[Delete projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/delete_project.htm "Delete a DevOps project along with its resources.")

#### Manage Build Pipelines

[Create build pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/create_buildpipeline.htm "Create a build pipeline to define the build process.")

[Build specification](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/build_specs.htm "The build specification contains build steps and settings that the build pipeline uses to run a build.")

[Update build pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_buildpipeline.htm "Update information such as the name and description of a build pipeline.")

[Run build pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/run_build.htm "Trigger the build process by manually running a DevOps build pipeline.")

#### Developer Tools

[DevOps API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/devops/)

[DevOps CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/devops.html)

[DevOps plug-in for Jenkins](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/devops_plugin.htm "This topic provides information about installing, configuring, and using the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) DevOps plugin for Jenkins.")

[DevOps reference architecture](https://docs.oracle.com/en/solutions/ci-cd-pipe-oci-devops/index.html#GUID-E9FFE063-2899-40B8-B01E-DB222870C9E0)

[Oracle Cloud Free Tier](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/free/)

#### Manage Code Repositories

[Create repository](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/create_repo.htm "Create code repositories in the DevOps service.")

[Create connection](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/create_connection.htm "Create a connection to external repositories such as GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket Cloud, Visual Builder Studio, Bitbucket Server, and GitLab Server.")

[Clone repository](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/clone_repo.htm "You can clone the code repository to create a local copy on your computer, add or remove files, commit changes, and work on different branches by using Git operations.")

[Manage pull requests](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/manage_pullrequest.htm "A pull request (PR) or request to merge is a workflow in software development that facilitates code changes to be merged from the local branch to the main project branch after review and approval.")

#### Manage Deployment Pipelines

[Create pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/deployment_pipelines.htm "A deployment pipeline holds the requirements that must be satisfied to deliver a set of artifacts to the target environment.")

[Deployment configuration](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/deployment_specs.htm "The deployment configuration file defines the artifacts to be downloaded to the instance and the location where the artifacts must be copied. The configuration file also specifies the sequence of commands for deployment.")

[Update pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_pipeline.htm "Update deployment pipeline information.")

[Run pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/run_pipeline.htm "Deploy applications by running a DevOps deployment pipeline.")

#### Community

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/devops/)

[DevOps resources](https://www.oracle.com/devops/devops-service/)

[A DevOps Engineer's Guide to OCI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Reference/getting-started-as-devops.htm)

# Data Integration

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Data Integration
================

Data Integration is a fully managed, multi-tenant service that helps data engineers and developers with data movement and data loading tasks. Powered by Spark ETL or ELT processes, a large volume of data can be ingested from a variety of data assets; cleansed; transformed and reshaped; and efficiently loaded to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure target data assets.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/data-integration)

#### Get Started

[Video: Overview](https://www.youtube.com/embed/nbB9nX6hZLw?rel=0&autoplay=1)

[Key concepts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/overview.htm#concepts "The following is a list of concepts that would be helpful for you to know when using the Data Integration service:")

[Check prerequisites](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/preparing-for-connectivity.htm "Before you create a Data Integration workspace, review the prerequisites and list of tasks that you, the customer, are responsible for.")

[Create policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/preparing-for-connectivity.htm#create-policies "To control non-administrator user access to Data Integration resources and functions, you create groups in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Identity and Access Management (IAM) with Identity Domains. Then you write IAM policies that give the groups proper access.")

[Create workspaces](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/workspaces.htm "A workspace is an organizational construct to keep multiple data integration projects and their resources (data assets, data flows, tasks, and so on) separate from each other, helping you to stay organized. For example, you can have separate workspaces for development, testing, and production.")

[Copy projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/creating-projects-from-existing.htm "Create a project by copying contents from an existing project in a Data Integration workspace.")

[Export/import objects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/export-import.htm "In Data Integration, the object types that you can export from a workspace and import to a workspace include projects and folders, tasks, applications, data flows, pipelines, and user-defined functions and functions libraries.")

[Secure Data Integration](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Reference/dataintegration_security.htm#Securing_Data_Integration)

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/integration/oracle-cloud-infrastructure-data-integration/)

#### Create Tasks

[Create integration tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/integration-tasks.htm "An integration task lets you take a Data Integration data flow and configure the parameter values you want to use at runtime.")

[Create data loader tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/data-loader-tasks.htm "A data loader task lets you take data from a source and load it into a target. Data loader tasks are essential for data preparation, data migration, or loading diverse data into data lakes or data warehouses.")

[Create SQL tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/sql-tasks.htm "A SQL task lets you run a SQL object in a Data Integration pipeline.")

[Create OCI Data Flow tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/oci-dataflow-tasks.htm "An Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Data Flow task lets you schedule, run, and monitor an OCI Data Flow application from within Data Integration.")

[Create REST tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/rest-tasks.htm "A REST task lets you call a REST API endpoint to perform an operation.")

[Create pipeline tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/pipeline-tasks.htm "A pipeline task lets configure parameter values you want to use at runtime in a Data Integration pipeline.")

#### Monitor Tasks and Applications

[View task runs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/task-runs-list.htm "When you run a task from an application in Data Integration, a run entry is created in the application.")

[Monitor applications](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/monitor.htm#monitor-application "View run information for an application within a specific time period.")

[Monitor workspaces](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/monitor.htm#monitor-workspace "The Monitor workspace page provides summary information about uptime and usage.")

#### Create Data Assets

[Supported data assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/data-assets-support.htm#data-sources "The following table lists the data sources that you can use with Data Integration.")

[Create data assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/data-assets.htm "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Data Integration supports a range of data source types, from databases to flat files, that you can use as sources and targets for your data integration tasks.")

#### Publish and Run Tasks

[Use applications](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/use-applications.htm "In Data Integration, an application is a container at the workspace level for runtime objects such as published tasks and task runs.")

[Use application templates](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/use-application-templates.htm "You can create an application by using an application template. Application templates are predefined tasks with parameters that provide out-of-the-box data integration solutions for common use cases.")

[Create applications](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/creating-applications.htm "Create applications in any compartment in a Data Integration workspace.")

[Publish tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/publish-design-tasks.htm "In Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Data Integration, a task is a design-time resource that specifies a set of actions to perform on data. You create tasks from a project details or folder details page, then you publish the tasks to an application for running, testing, or rolling out to production environments.")

[Run tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/published-tasks.htm "In Data Integration, only published tasks can be run.")

[Schedule tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/schedules.htm "Run a task manually or use schedules and task schedules to automate the running of tasks in Data Integration.")

#### Developer Tools

[Data Integration API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/data-integration/latest/)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

#### Community

[Data Integration blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/dataintegration/oracle-cloud-infrastructure-data-integration)

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://community.oracle.com/tech/apps-infra/categories/18430-cloud-infrastructure)

[Data Integration learning videos](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKCk3OyNwIzst4RMY50SHAZ2cxD4AHFG5)

#### Create Data Flows

[Understand operators](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/using-operators.htm "In Data Integration, data flow operators represent input sources, output targets, and transformations that can be used in a data flow.")

[Create data flows](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/design.htm "A data flow is a visual program representing the flow of data from source data assets, such as a database or flat file, to target data assets, such as a data lake or data warehouse.")

[Use transformations](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/data-xplorer.htm "Data transformations are rules that you can use to cleanse, reshape, and process data before loading to target data assets.")

[Use parameters](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/parameterization.htm "In Data Integration, the types of parameters you can use in data flows are user-defined or system-generated.")

[Use functions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/data-flow-add-functions.htm "The following functions are used with operators in a data flow, to enable you to build expressions.")

#### Create Pipelines

[Understand operators](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/pipeline-operators.htm "In Data Integration, pipeline operators represent different tasks and activities that can be used in a pipeline.")

[Create pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/pipeline.htm "A pipeline is a design-time resource in Data Integration for connecting tasks and activities in one or more sequences or in parallel from start to finish to orchestrate data processing.")

[Create pipeline tasks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/pipeline-tasks.htm "A pipeline task lets configure parameter values you want to use at runtime in a Data Integration pipeline.")

[Use parameters](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/pipeline-parameters.htm "In Data Integration, parameters in pipelines originate from parameters that are assigned in data flows and tasks.")

[Use functions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/pipeline-add-functions.htm "The following functions are used with the expression and decision operators in a pipeline.")

#### Troubleshooting

[Enable logging](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/logging.htm "Data Integration lets you use Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Logging to enable logging and retrieve service logs in the Console or from the CLI.")

[Troubleshooting Data Integration](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/troubleshooting-dis.htm "Use troubleshooting information to identify and address common issues that can occur while working with Data Integration.")

[Known issues](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-integration/using/known-issue.htm "Known issues have been identified in Data Integration.")

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

# Resource Scheduler

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Resource Scheduler
==================

Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Resource Scheduler is an Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) service that can reduce the cost of your database and compute OCI cloud resources in your tenancy, organization, realm, or other group of centrally managed tenancies by using a schedule to automatically stop them when they are not needed, and restart them when they are needed again.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/resource-scheduler/)

#### Get Started

[About Resource Scheduler](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/concepts/resourcescheduleroverview-about.htm "Learn about Resource Scheduler and how you can use it to reduce the costs of resources in your Oracle Cloud Infrastructure tenancy by automatically starting and stopping to meet your particular business needs. You can also schedule backups of the Oracle Autonomous AI Database on Dedicated Exadata Infrastructure using Resource Scheduler.")

[How Resource Scheduler Works](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/concepts/resourcescheduleroverview-about.htm#resourcescheduleroverview-operation)

[Resource Scheduler Resource Management](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/concepts/resourcescheduleer-howitworks_resource_mgmt.htm "Learn about various types of resource management used by Resource Scheduler.")

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Using Resource Scheduler

[List Existing Schedules](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/listing-schedules.htm "Learn about how to use IAM policies to ensure secure access to Resource Scheduler to create and manage Resource Scheduler schedules and other functionality.")

[Create Schedules](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/create-manage.htm "Create a Resource Scheduler schedule to reduce the costs of resources in your tenancy by automatically starting and stopping them as needed.")

[Manage Schedules](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/managing-schedules.htm "Manage your Resource Scheduler schedules, including creating, updating, and deleting them.")

([Edit](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/editing_a_schedule.htm "Update a Resource Scheduler schedule's settings.")
, [Clone](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/clone-schedule.htm "Copy a Resource Scheduler schedule.")
, [Enable](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/enable-schedule.htm "Enable a Resource Scheduler schedule to manage resources.")
, [Disable](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/disabling_a_schedule.htm "Disable a Resource Scheduler schedule from managing resources.")
, [Delete](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/deleting_a_schedule.htm "Delete a Resource Scheduler schedule from your Oracle Cloud Infrastructure tenancy.")
)

[Manage Work Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/work-requests.htm "Manage and view information on Resource Scheduler work requests.")

[Resource Scheduler IAM Policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/resource-scheduler/tasks/listing-schedules.htm "Learn about how to use IAM policies to ensure secure access to Resource Scheduler to create and manage Resource Scheduler schedules and other functionality.")

(Resource Types, Variables, Verbs, Permissions, Examples)

#### Developer Tools

[Resource Scheduler API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/resource-scheduler/latest)

[Resource Scheduler CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/resource-scheduler.html)

[CLI Command Reference](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/)

Using Marketplace

Oracle Marketplace is an online store—a one-stop shop—selling hundreds of business apps and professional services that complement your existing Oracle Cloud implementation.

*   [Customer-Consumer: Commercial Information for Marketplace](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Marketplace/customer-consumer.htm "The customer is the end user of a publisher's listing on Oracle Marketplace. Customers can access the listings published by the publishers after the customers meets the requirements to be eligible as a marketplace consumer.")

# Secure Desktops

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Secure Desktops
===============

Use Secure Desktops to create pools of identically configured virtual desktops on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure that individual users can securely access.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/secure-desktops)

#### Get Started

[Overview](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/overview-secure-desktops.htm#about-secure-desktops "The Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Secure Desktops service allows an administrator to create a set of identically configured virtual desktops, which individual users can then securely access.")

[Set up the tenancy](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/setup-tenancy.htm#setup-tenancy "To set up the tenancy for Secure Desktops, the tenancy administrator must set up compartments, create policies for users and groups, and configure the available images, storage, and network for the desktop administrator to use.")

[Desktop Administrator first steps](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/admin-first-steps.htm#admin-first-steps "The desktop administrator manages desktop pools and storage volumes. However, the tenancy administrator must first set up user access and desktop images.")

[Desktop User first steps](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/user-first-steps.htm#user-first-steps "A desktop user accesses an individual desktop within a desktop pool.")

#### Manage Desktop Pools

[Create a new pool](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/create-pool.htm#top "Create a pool of identically configured desktops hosted on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) by using the Secure Desktops service.")

[Edit an existing pool](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/update-pool.htm#update-pool "Edit desktop pool parameters after creating the desktop pool in Secure Desktops. Editing the desktop pool doesn't change all properties of existing desktops in the desktop pool. Desktops need to be disconnected and restarted for changes to take effect.")

[Stop or restart a pool](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/stop-restart-desktops.htm#start-stop-pool "Start or stop an individual desktop or all desktops in a desktop pool using Secure Desktops.")

[Delete a pool](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/delete-pool.htm#delete-pool "Permanently delete an individual desktop in a desktop pool or delete the desktop pool to end all desktops in the pool.")

#### Training Videos

[Overview \[2 min\]](https://youtu.be/pwElvYIZzaM)

[Training Track](https://www.oracle.com/goto/osdlearning)

#### Support

[Get help and contact Support](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/epmos/faces/MosIndex.jspx)

#### Manage Desktops

[Open your desktop](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/connect-to-desktop.htm#connect-to-desktop "Always open your desktop from the Secure Desktops Interface. Don't try to open the installed client directly from your computer.")

[Download the desktop client](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/installed-client.htm#install-client "Download and install the client on your local system as an alternative to the browser for accessing your virtual desktop. Using the installed client provides full access to the desktop.")

[Set the preferred client](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/set-preferred-client.htm#default-client "Select the client to use when opening the desktop. By default, Secure Desktops uses the web client.")

[Troubleshooting](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/troubleshooting-end-user.htm#troubleshoot-your-desktop "Resolve issues you encounter when using your virtual desktop.")

#### Manage Images

[Supported images](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/desktop-image.htm#desktop-image "A desktop image is a compute image with additional configuration applied, used by the desktops in a desktop pool.")

[Build on existing image](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/create-custom-image.htm#build-base-image "To create a custom image, we recommend that you modify one of the base images provided by Oracle for use in Secure Desktops. Desktops that use the image will include the customizations, configuration, and software installed when you created the image.")

[Use Windows image](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/windows-image.htm#windows-image "To create a desktop pool using Windows, you must bring your own license.")

#### Developer Tools

[Secure Desktops API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/secure-desktops/latest/)

[Secure Desktops CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/desktops.html)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Manage Storage

[Manage storage volumes](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/volumes.htm#volumes "A volume provides the storage for a specific desktop instance.")

[View all existing storage](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/view-volumes.htm#view-all-volumes "View a list of defined storage volumes in Secure Desktops.")

[Delete unattached storage](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/delete-volumes.htm#delete-volumes "Permanently delete inactive storage volumes to free up resources in Secure Desktops.")

#### Manage Policies

[Define policies for the service](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/policies.htm#policies "Each service in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure integrates with Identity and Access Management (IAM) for authentication and authorization for all interfaces (the Console, SDK or CLI, and REST API).")

[View policy details](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/policies.htm#policy-details "In a policy statement you use verbs, resource types, and variables to grant access to services and resources. You can also use permissions or API operations to reduce the scope of access granted by a particular verb.")

#### Troubleshooting

[Troubleshooting](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/troubleshooting.htm#troubleshooting "Troubleshoot user issues encountered in Secure Desktops.")

[Known Issues](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/secure-desktops/known-issues.htm#known-issues "These known issues have been identified in Secure Desktops.")

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://community.oracle.com/tech/apps-infra/categories/18430-cloud-infrastructure)

---

# Data Catalog

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Data Catalog
============

Data Catalog is a fully managed, self-service, data discovery and governance solution for your enterprise data. With Data Catalog, you get a single collaborative environment to manage technical, business, and operational metadata.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/data-catalog/)

#### Get Started

[Video: Overview](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nY7mG2u6-Ew)

[Data Catalog concepts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/overview.htm#concepts)

[Create a data catalog](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/create-instance.htm "Create and manage a data catalog.")

[Take a workshop](https://apexapps.oracle.com/pls/apex/dbpm/r/livelabs/view-workshop?wid=919)

[Tutorial: Get started with Data Catalog](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/data-catalog/tutorials/get-started/01-overview.htm)

[Create IAM policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/policies.htm "Create policies to control who has access to Data Catalog, and the type of access for each group of users.")

[Data Catalog product page](https://www.oracle.com/big-data/data-catalog/)

#### Developer Tools

[API for Data Catalog](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/data-catalog/)

[Data Catalog CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/data-catalog.html)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Harvest Technical Metadata

[Create data assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/setup-source.htm "Register the data sources that you want to harvest, in Data Catalog. You register the data sources as data assets.")

[Harvest data assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/harvest-data-asset.htm "When you harvest a data asset, the technical metadata is extracted into your data catalog repository.")

[Tutorial: Harvest from Object Storage](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/data-catalog/tutorials/harvest-object-storage/overview.htm)

[Tutorial: Harvest on-premises data sources](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/data-catalog/tutorials/harvest-onprem-pe/01-overview.htm)

#### Enrich Metadata

[Enrich technical metadata](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/enrich-metadata.htm "Use Data Catalog to enrich the harvested technical metadata.")

[Manage business glossaries](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/manage-glossary.htm "Learn how to create a business glossary and work with it further.")

[Manage custom properties](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/custom-properties.htm "You use custom properties to define metadata to capture business context for a data catalog object.")

[Use tags](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/link-tags.htm "Use a word or a phrase as tags to classify objects in the data catalog. Tags are free-form annotations that help you capture tribal knowledge at the data catalog object level based on your business needs.")

[Tutorial: Enrich Metadata using custom properties](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/data-catalog/tutorials/custom-properties/custom-properties-overview.htm)

#### Community

[Data Catalog learning videos](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKCk3OyNwIzvb6dEZRC31ShRQN23eA4k9)

[Data Catalog blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/post/what-is-oci-data-catalog)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://community.oracle.com/tech/apps-infra/categories/18430-cloud-infrastructure)

#### Search and Explore

[Search for data objects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/use-search-bar.htm "You use the Search within this data catalog in the Home tab or the Search within <data object> boxes in the various data catalog objects tabs to enter a search text and retrieve all data objects matching the search text in the data catalog.")

[Browse data assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/browse-data-assets.htm "Use the browse data assets option to conveniently view and navigate all the data assets created in the data catalog repository.")

[Explore the data catalog](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/explore.htm "You access all the data catalog objects that you create in the data catalog by exploring the data catalog.")

#### Configure a Private Network

[Create a private endpoint](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/pe-create.htm "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure lets you create private endpoints within your service so that you can access resources that are only available using private IPs. In Data Catalog, you create a private endpoint to configure the private network where your data source is hosted.")

[Video: Understanding Private Endpoints in Data Catalog](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=skdpLFlxDJo)

[Tutorial: Harvest from autonomous databases with private access](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/data-catalog/tutorials/harvest-autonomous-pe/01-overview.htm)

[Tutorial: Harvest an Oracle database hosted in a public subnet](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/data-catalog/tutorials/harvest-oracle-dbcs/dbcs-overview.htm)

#### Metastore

[About the Data Catalog metastore](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/metastore.htm "Apache Hive is a data warehousing framework, which facilitates read, write, or manage operations on large datasets that reside in distributed systems.")

[Create a metastore](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/metastore-create.htm "Create a metastore in your tenancy. You can create only one metastore in a compartment in your tenancy.")

[Use a metastore in Data Flow](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/metastore-using.htm "After you create a metastore in Data Catalog, you can create, manage, and run applications in OCI Data Flow to enable them to read or write to a Hive Metastore.")

[Move a metastore](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-catalog/using/metastore-move.htm "Move a metastore from one compartment to another.")

---

# Search with OpenSearch

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Search with OpenSearch
======================

Search with OpenSearch is a managed service that enables you to build in-application search solutions based on OpenSearch.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/search-opensearch)

#### Get Started

[Learn about Search with OpenSearch](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Concepts/ociopensearch.htm "OCI Search with OpenSearch is a managed service that you can use to build in-application search solutions based on OpenSearch to enable you to search large datasets and return results in milliseconds, without having to focus on managing your infrastructure.")

[Security with Search with OpenSearch](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Concepts/ociopensearchsecurity.htm "Securely search with OCI Search with OpenSearch.")

[Create an OpenSearch cluster](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Tasks/creatingsearchclusters.htm "Create an OpenSearch cluster to establish the set of Compute instances that provide the OpenSearch functionality.")

[FAQ](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/search/faq/)

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/search/)

#### Developer Tools

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

[API for Search with OpenSearch](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/opensearch/latest)

#### OpenSearch Clusters

[Import an external cluster](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Concepts/importingacluster.htm "You can bring existing clusters from your external OpenSearch installations to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. This enables you to take advantage of the managed service capabilities provided by Search with OpenSearch.")

[Manage clusters](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Tasks/manageociopensearch.htm "OCI Search with OpenSearch lets you create OpenSearch clusters for your search solutions.")

[Resize a cluster](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Tasks/resizingacluster.htm "Resize an OpenSearch cluster to change the node configuration to meet performance and other requirements.")

[Create cluster backups](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Concepts/ociopensearchbackups.htm "OCI Search with OpenSearch creates backups of your OpenSearch clusters automatically.")

[Connect to a cluster](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Tasks/ingestingociopensearchdata.htm "This topic covers the prerequisites and connection details required to connect to your OpenSearch cluster for OCI Search with OpenSearch. It also includes a walkthrough that covers the steps for some basic connection scenarios using a VM instance in the same VCN and subnet as the cluster.")

[Cluster metrics](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/ociopensearchmetrics.htm "You monitor the health, capacity, and performance of OpenSearch clusters by using metrics, alarms, and notifications.")

#### Ingesting and Searching Data

[Ingest data into OpenSearch clusters](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Tasks/ociopensearchingestingdata.htm "OpenSearch supports using agents and ingestion tools to send data, such as log data to OpenSearch clusters.")

[Perform semantic search with Search with OpenSearch](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Concepts/semanticsearch.htm "OCI Search with OpenSearch supports semantic search starting with OpenSearch version 2.11.")

[Conversational search with Generative AI and Search with OpenSearch](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/search-opensearch/Concepts/ocigenaiconnector.htm "Follow the steps in this walkthrough to set up and use an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline in OCI Search with OpenSearch, using an OCI Generative AI connector.")

#### Community

[About OpenSearch](https://opensearch.org/)

[OpenSearch project on GitHub](https://github.com/opensearch-project)

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

# Automated CEMLI Execution

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Automated CEMLI Execution
=========================

Oracle Automated CEMLI Execution manages customizations in your Oracle E-Business Suite environments. These customizations are known collectively as CEMLIs - that is, configurations, extensions, modifications, localizations, and integrations.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/auto_cemli_execution/)

#### Get Started

[Overview of Automated CEMLI Execution](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_introduction.htm#ace_introduction "Oracle Automated CEMLI Execution is designed to manage customizations in your Oracle E-Business Suite environments. These customizations are known collectively as CEMLIs - that is, configurations, extensions, modifications, localizations, and integrations. When CEMLIs are not managed, they can contribute to increased maintenance costs, performance issues, and unplanned outages.")

[Working with Instances](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_working_with_instances.htm#ace_working_with_instances "Learn how to use the Instances tab to add new instances, edit existing instances, and select an instance to associate your CEMLIs with.")

[Using Packager](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_using_packager.htm#ace_using_packager "Learn how to use the Packager option, the core tool in Oracle Automated CEMLI Execution (ACE).")

#### Key Features

[Using Packager](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_using_packager.htm#ace_using_packager "Learn how to use the Packager option, the core tool in Oracle Automated CEMLI Execution (ACE).")

[ace\_using\_config\_automation.htm](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_using_config_automation.htm)

[Using Bounce](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_using_bounce.htm#ace_using_bounce "Learn how the OCI users can work with self-service Bounce to shut down, start up, and bounce DB Tier and MidTiers and/or MidTier components (individual or combination of components).")

[CEMLI File Object Types](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_cemli_file_object_types.htm#ace_cemli_file_object_types "Learn about all CEMLI file objects that are supported in Oracle Automated CEMLI Execution Release 18.1.")

[CEMLI File Header Format](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_cemli_file_header_format.htm#ace_cemli_file_header_format "Learn the correct format for CEMLI file headers.")

#### Working with Oracle Automated CEMLI Execution

[Working with CEMLI Files](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_working_with_cemli_files.htm#ace_working_with_cemli_files "Learn the actions that you can take on CEMLI files using Oracle Automated CEMLI Execution.")

[Building Custom Patches](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_building_custom_patches.htm#ace_building_custom_patches "You can now use the files you have uploaded to create custom patches which can be applied to your environments.")

[Scheduling Custom Patches for Deployment](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/auto-cemli-execution/ace_scheduling_custom_patches_for_deployment.htm#ace_scheduling_custom_patches_for_deployment "Learn how to schedule custom patches for deployment.")

#### Developer Tools

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Support

[Get help and contact Support](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/epmos/faces/MosIndex.jspx)

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://community.oracle.com/tech/apps-infra/categories/18430-cloud-infrastructure)

Cloud![Graphic for Getting Started page](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/dcommon/img/cloudgs_bigdatadisc.png)

Oracle Big Data Discovery Cloud Service  

==========================================

Get Started
-----------

Oracle Big Data Discovery Cloud Service is a set of end-to-end visual analytic capabilities in the cloud that leverage the power of Hadoop to transform raw data into business insight in minutes, without the need to learn complex products or rely only on highly skilled resources.

  
  

![getting started image](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/dcommon/img/64_1.png)

#### Learn the Service

*   [Learn about the service](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/BDDGS/cgs_about_bddcs.htm#BDDGS-concept_56E499B8E2724F07B327C185BB1CBB7A)
    
*   [Learn about Big Data Discovery](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/BDDGS/cgs_welcome_root.htm#BDDGS-concept_DB7F99BEA583489CA8007B4B9314F8B0)
    
*   [Show me the service![Opens a video](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/dcommon/img/label_video.png "Opens a video")](https://apexapps.oracle.com/pls/apex/f?p=44785:265:0::::P265_CONTENT_ID:10838)
    
*   [Take a tour of Studio](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/BDDGS/cgs_studio_stub.htm#BDDGS-concept_F8C00A6B49F84A97B6245CDA76FC945E)
    
*   [What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/BDDGS/cgs_whats_new_bddcs.htm#BDDGS-concept_D0233099078A456FA789B8F120087658)
    

![getting started image](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/dcommon/img/64_2.png)

#### Get Ready to Subscribe

*   [Before you subscribe](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/BDDGS/cgs_subscribe_prereqs.htm#BDDGS-concept_ED2C72E278AD4C6890F205BFED5AC74E)
    
*   [Show me how to provision the service![Opens a video](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/dcommon/img/label_video.png "Opens a video")](https://apexapps.oracle.com/pls/apex/f?p=44785:265:0::::P265_CONTENT_ID:13159)

*   [Learn about users and roles](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/BDDGS/cgs_lifecycle_user_access_in_bddcs.htm#BDDGS-concept_l1i2f3c4y5c6l7e8hhhnnnppuuyytds)

![getting started image](https://docs.oracle.com/cloud/latest/big-data-discovery-cloud/dcommon/img/64_3.png)

# Organization Management

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Organization Management
=======================

Use Organization Management to centrally manage many tenancies, invite and create child tenancies, view and map subscriptions, and create and attach governance rules to tenancies in an organization.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/governance/)

#### Get Started

[Learn about Organization Management](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/organization_management_overview.htm "Use Organization Management to centrally manage many tenancies, invite and create child tenancies, view and map subscriptions, and create and attach governance rules to tenancies in an organization.")

[Required permissions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/organization_required_iam_policy.htm "Learn about Organization Management required IAM policies.")

[Multitenancy planning considerations](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/organization_planning.htm "Before you add more tenancies, evaluate your needs to ensure that a multi-tenancy approach is best for your workloads. The main reason to have multiple tenancies is for strong isolation, to help isolating workloads.")

[View organization subscriptions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/list-subscriptions.htm "View the subscriptions in Organization Management that a root compartment owns.")

[Cost reporting integration](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/organization_cost_reporting.htm "You can use the Oracle billing and cost reporting features to centrally manage the cost and usage information across all tenancies in your organization.")

#### Add and Remove Tenancies

[Create new child tenancies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/child-tenancy-create.htm "Create a child tenancy in your organization.")

[Invite existing tenancies to join an organization](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/sender-invitation-create.htm "Create an invitation to join an organization and asynchronously send the invitation to the recipient tenancy.")

[Remove invited child tenancies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/link-delete.htm "As a parent tenancy, you can remove an invited child tenancy from the organization. Only invited child tenancies can be removed. Removing an invited child tenancy unlinks the tenancy from the organization so that the parent doesn't have cost or governance access.")

[Transfer a created child tenancy to another organization](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/approve-createdchildtenancy-for-transfer.htm "Approve an organization's created child tenancy for transfer from one parent tenancy to another parent tenancy.")

[Delete child tenancies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/organization-tenancy-delete.htm "If certain validations are successful, start tenancy deletion. An OCI administrator can delete a child tenancy, depending on the type of child tenancy.")

#### Manage Invitations

[View invitations](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/sender-invitation-list.htm "View a list of invitations sent to tenancies inviting them to join an organization.")

[Cancel a tenancy invitation](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/sender-invitation-cancel.htm "Cancel an invitation sent to a tenancy to join an organization.")

[Accept an invitation to join an organization](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/recipient-invitation-accept.htm "Accept an invitation from a parent tenancy to join an organization.")

[Decline an invitation to join an organization](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/recipient-invitation-ignore.htm "Decline an invitation from a parent tenancy to join an organization.")

#### Developer Tools

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

[API for Organization Management](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/organizations/latest/)

[CLI for Organization Management](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/organizations.html)

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

[Use organizations to centrally manage costs](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/post/use-organizations-to-centrally-manage-costs)

[Govern an OCI organization with governance rules](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/post/govern-your-oci-organization-with-governance-rules-part-2)

[Structure an OCI organization into groups for cost optimization and reporting](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/post/structure-your-oci-organization-into-groups-for-cost-optimization-and-reporting-part-3-of-3)

#### Subscriptions and Governance Rules

[Map subscriptions to tenancies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/subscription-mapping-management.htm "Learn about subscription mapping management.")

[Set the default subscription](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/subscription-setdefault.htm "When more than one Oracle Universal Credits subscriptions exist in a tenancy, you can specify which subscription is the default one on the subscription mapping details page. Any active Oracle Universal Credits subscription can be configured as the default. Invited or newly created child tenancies are automatically mapped to an organization's default subscription.")

[Add governance rules](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/add-governance.htm "Use governance rules to configure and attach controls to tenancies in your organization. When a governance rule is attached to a tenancy, a corresponding resource is created and then locked in the target tenancy.")

[Create governance rules and attach to tenancies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/add-governance-createattachrule.htm "Create a governance rule and attach it to one or more child tenancies in your organization.")

[Opt in tenancies to use governance rules](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/add-governance-optinuserules.htm "Certain types of tenancies that are already part of the organization can opt in to use governance rules.")

[Opt out tenancies from governance rules](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/remove-governance.htm "Parent tenancies in an organization can remove governance (opt out themselves or child tenancies) from using governance rules.")

#### Troubleshooting

[Governance Rules that Need Attention](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/organization-troubleshooting.htm#govrules_need_attention "Sometimes governance rules require attention while attaching to one or many tenancies in the organization.")

#### Support

[Getting help](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/support/getting-help.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

[Tenancy support](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/General/organization/organizations_support.htm "Depending on how you created your tenancy, you have separate CSI (Customer Support Identifier) numbers, and support accounts for each tenancy. Created child tenancies inherit the parent subscription CSI.")

---

# DNS and Traffic Management

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

DNS and Traffic Management
==========================

The DNS service helps you create and manage DNS zones.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/dns/)

#### Get Started

[Overview of DNS](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Concepts/dnszonemanagement.htm "The DNS service helps you create and manage DNS zones.")

[Video: Overview](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CbXlVm_kSmY)

[Use the DNS management overview page](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/consoleoverview.htm "The Overview page in the DNS Management section of the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Console provides links to details about service resources, steps to get started, and service health.")

[Learn about traffic management](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/TrafficManagement/Concepts/overview.htm "Traffic Management helps you guide traffic to endpoints based on various conditions, including endpoint health and the geographic origins of DNS requests.")

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/networking/dns/)

#### Traffic Management

[Traffic steering scenarios](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/TrafficManagement/Concepts/overview.htm#scenarios)

[Create a traffic management policy](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/TrafficManagement/Concepts/overview.htm#managing-steering-policies "Traffic Management steering policies can account for health of answers to provide failover capabilities, provide the ability to load balance traffic across many resources, and account for the location where the query originated to provide a flexible and powerful mechanism to efficiently steer DNS traffic.")

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Public DNS

[Create a zone](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Concepts/gettingstarted_topic-Creating_a_Zone.htm "Create a public domain name service (DNS) zone to hold the trusted DNS records that reside on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure's nameservers.")

[Delegate a zone](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Concepts/gettingstarted_topic-Delegating_Your_Zone.htm "Make an OCI public domain name service (DNS) zone accessible through the internet.")

[Add a DNS record](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/record-add.htm "Add records that contain domain information to a domain name service (DNS) zone. Each record type contains information called record data (RDATA).")

[Set up reverse DNS](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/reversedns.htm "Reverse DNS maps an IP address to a hostname.")

#### Manage DNS

[Manage DNS zones](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/managingdnszones.htm "The Oracle Cloud Infrastructure DNS service lets you manage zones using the Console, CLI, or API.")

[Format a zone file](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Reference/formattingzonefile.htm "A domain name service (DNS) zone file is a text file that describes a DNS zone. The BIND file format is the industry preferred zone file format and has been widely adopted by DNS server software.")

[Manage HTTP redirects](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/httpredirect.htm)

[Manage TSIG keys](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/tsig.htm "Transaction signature (TSIG), also referred to as Secret Key Transaction Authentication, ensures that domain name service (DNS) packets originate from an authorized sender by using shared secret keys and one-way hashing to add a cryptographic signature to the DNS packets.")

#### Developer Tools

[DNS CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/dns.html)

[DNS API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/dns/latest/)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Private DNS

[Learn about private DNS](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/privatedns.htm "Create and manage private domain name system (DNS) zones.")

[Create a private zone](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/create-private-zone.htm "Create a private domain name service (DNS) zone to manage records and hostname resolution for applications running within and between virtual cloud networks (VCNs), and on-premises or other private networks.")

[Add a DNS record](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/record-add.htm "Add records that contain domain information to a domain name service (DNS) zone. Each record type contains information called record data (RDATA).")

#### Reference

[Supported DNS resource record types](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Reference/supporteddnsresource.htm "Learn about managing the many resource record types that the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure DNS service supports.")

[Steering policy geokeys](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/TrafficManagement/Reference/trafficmanagementgeo.htm "Lists the geokeys for the Traffic Management Steering Policy service.")

#### Troubleshooting

[Troubleshoot private DNS](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/troubleshooting.htm "Use troubleshooting information to identify and address common issues that can occur while working with DNS.")

[Test DNS using BIND's dig tool](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/DNS/Tasks/testingdnsusingdig.htm "Use BIND'S Domain Information Groper (dig) command line tool to test against the delegation where the domain is hosted. Immediately see whether changes took place without accounting for the cache or TTL (Time to Live) that you have configured.")

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

# Roving Edge Classic

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Roving Edge Classic
===================

Use Roving Edge Infrastructure to put fundamental Oracle Cloud Infrastructure services where data is generated and consumed, regardless of network connectivity, through the use of Roving Edge Devices.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/rover/)

#### Get Started

[Overview of Roving Edge Infrastructure](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/overview.htm#WhatIsRovingEdgeInfra "Learn about the Roving Edge Infrastructure service and associated devices, including how it works and what it does.")

[Access Roving Edge Infrastructure](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Access/access.htm#access "Learn about the different methods for accessing Roving Edge Infrastructure resources.")

[Review device specifications](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/device_specifications.htm#DeviceSpecifications "Describes the hardware and port specifications for Roving Edge Infrastructure devices.")

[Request and Receive Roving Edge Devices](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/requesting-and-receiving-devices.htm#requesting-and-receiving-devices "Learn how to request and receive Roving Edge Compute, GPU, Storage, and Ultra devices.")

[Manage nodes](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Node/node_management.htm#NodeManagement "Oracle is no longer shipping Roving Edge first generation devices that are based on the RED.GPU.1.RX1.40 shape.")

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/roving-edge-infrastructure/)

#### Troubleshooting

[Roving Edge Troubleshooting](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/troubleshooting.htm#troubleshooting "Use troubleshooting information to identify and address common issues that can occur while working with Roving Edge Infrastructure.")

[Known Issues for Roving Edge](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/known-issues.htm#Troubleshooting "The following known issue is identified in Roving Edge Infrastructure.")

#### On-Device Services

[Identity and access management](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/IAM/identity_management.htm#IAM "Learn about managing Identity and Access Management (IAM) tasks on your Roving Edge Infrastructure devices.")

[Compute virtual machine infrastructure](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Compute/compute_management.htm#IAM "Describes the on-device services you can use to set up compute virtual machines within your Roving Edge Infrastructure environment.")

[Object storage](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Object_Storage/object_storage_overview.htm#ObjectStorageOverview "Describes how to manage object storage tasks, including those for buckets and objects, on your Roving Edge Infrastructure devices.")

[Block volumes](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Block_Volume/block_volume_management.htm#BlockVolumeManagement "Describes how to manage block volume tasks, including creating, updating, and deleting block volumes, on your Roving Edge Infrastructure devices.")

[Networking](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Network/networking_management.htm#NetworkingManagement "Describes how to manage your Networking resources on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure devices.")

[Functions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Object_Storage/functions.htm#functions "Describes how to assign a function to an object storage event for Roving Edge Infrastructure.")

#### Device Tasks

[Monitor devices](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Device_Monitoring/device_monitoring.htm#NodeManagement "Describes how to monitor the system health and storage capacities of your Roving Edge Infrastructure components.")

[Manage device software versions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Device_Software/device_software_management.htm#software_updates_0 "Learn how to manage the system software, including software upgrades and rollbacks, on your Roving Edge devices in both connected (online) and disconnected (offline) states.")

[Synchronize device data with OCI](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Rover/Data_Sync/datasynctask_management.htm#DataSyncTaskManagement "Learn how to manage the transmission of object storage data between buckets on your Roving Edge Infrastructure devices and your Oracle Cloud Infrastructure tenancy.")

#### Developer Tools

[API for Roving Edge Infrastructure](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/rover/latest/)

[CLI for Roving Edge Infrastructure](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/rover.html)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://community.oracle.com/tech/apps-infra/categories/18430-cloud-infrastructure)

#### Support

[Getting Help and Contacting Support](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

# Audit

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Audit/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Audit
=====

The Audit service provides visibility into activities related to your Oracle Cloud Infrastructure resources and tenancy. Audit log events can be used for security audits, to track usage of and changes to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure resources, and to help ensure compliance with standards or regulations.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/audit/)

#### Get Started

[Learn about Audit](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Audit/Concepts/auditoverview.htm "Describes the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Audit service, which automatically records calls to all supported Oracle Cloud Infrastructure public application programming interface (API) endpoints as log events.")

[Audit log event contents](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Audit/Reference/logeventreference.htm "Describes the contents of an Audit log event.")

[Example audit log](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Audit/Reference/logeventreference.htm#example)

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Developer Tools

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

[API for Audit](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/audit/latest/)

[CLI for Audit](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/audit.html)

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Use Audit

[View audit log events](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Audit/Tasks/viewinglogevents.htm "Describes how to view Audit log events.")

[Audit log retention](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Audit/Tasks/settingretentionperiod.htm "Describes the Audit log retention period.")

[Bulk export of audit log events](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Audit/Concepts/bulkexport.htm "Describes how to export Audit log events in bulk.")

Compartment Quotas
==================

Use Compartment Quotas in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure to control resource consumption within compartments.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/compartment-quotas/index.htm)

#### Get Started

[Sample quotas](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Quotas/Concepts/sample_quotas.htm "Learn about sample quotas with specific examples of how to use quota policies.")

# Network Command Center Services

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Concepts/net_command_center.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Network Command Center Services
===============================

Learn about the abilities of the Network Command Center services.

The following diagnostic and troubleshooting services are considered part of the Network Command Center:

*   [Inter-Region Latency](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Concepts/inter_region_latency.htm "View the Inter-Region Latency dashboard in the Console. The dashboard provides the average network round-trip latency (round-trip time or RTT) for all pairs of regions in an Oracle Cloud Infrastructure realm. In realms with only one region, the Inter-Region Latency dashboard isn't available.")
    
*   [Network Path Analyzer](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Concepts/path_analyzer.htm "Learn about the Network Path Analyzer tool.")
    
*   [Network Visualizer](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Concepts/network_visualizer.htm "Learn about the Network Visualizer tool in Network Command Center.")
    
*   [Virtual Test Access Points (VTAPs)](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Tasks/vtap.htm "A Virtual Test Access Point (VTAP) provides a way to mirror traffic from a selected source to a selected target to help in troubleshooting, security analysis, and data monitoring.")
    
*   [Flow Logs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Concepts/vcn-flow-logs.htm "Use VCN flow logs to capture network traffic information to support monitoring and security needs.")

---
