# Internet of Things

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Internet of Things
==================

The Internet of Things Platform provides bidirectional communication and data collection between Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) and your devices or external applications.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/internet-of-things/index.htm)

#### Get Started

[Overview](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/overview.htm "Use the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Internet of Things Platform to transfer data to and from your devices and sensors to OCI.")

[Prerequisites](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/overview.htm#prerequisites)

[Quick start](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/quick-start.htm "This scenario shows how to create a digital twin instance and how to test your configuration by sending sample data using basic authentication.")

[Policy reference](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Identity/policyreference/iot-policy-reference.htm)

[Scenarios](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/scenarios.htm "Review these scenarios to understand how the Internet of Things (IoT) Platform works.")

#### Work with Domain Groups and Domains

[IoT domain groups](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/domain-groups.htm "An IoT domain group is a compartmental resource that if configured, contains a collection of IoT domains.")

[IoT domains](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/domains.htm "An IoT domain is located in a specific compartment within a domain group and receives data on a unique device endpoint that connects to a dedicated database instance and schema.")

[IoT work requests](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/work-requests.htm "Get work request information for IoT domain and domain group operations.")

#### Work with Digital Twins

[Digital twin models](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/digital-twin-models.htm "Add, update, delete, view, and get the digital twin model's specifications for your Internet of Things.")

[Digital twin adapters](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/digital-twin-adapters.htm "The digital twin adapter specifies the data mappings and reference payload associated with a digital twin. Add, list, update, or delete a digital twin adapter for your Internet of Things.")

[Digital twin instances](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/digital-twin-instances.htm "Add, view, update, delete, send raw commands and get content using your Internet of Things (IoT) digital twin instances.")

[Digital twin relationships](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/digital-twin-relationships.htm "Add, view, update, and delete digital twin relationships for your Internet of Things.")

#### Connect a Device

[Send unstructured data using HTTPs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/unstructured-data-https.htm "This scenario explains how to use the Internet of Things Platform to connect a device to send unstructured telemetry data to the cloud using HTTPs, and how to view the data in APEX.")

[Send structured data in default format using HTTPs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/structured-default-https.htm "Use this scenario for an IoT device that sends structured data in a default format to the Internet of Things (IoT) platform.")

[Send structured data in default format using MQTTs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/structured-default-mqtt.htm "Review this scenario to learn how to create a digital twin model to receive historized telemetry data from a pulse oximeter using MQTTs and how to view IoT data in APEX.")

[Send structured data in custom format using HTTPs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/structured-custom-https.htm "Use this scenario to send and monitor structured data from a device in a custom format. If a device sends data in a custom format, that means the device cannot be programmed to change its output.")

[Receive an unstructured command and send responses using MQTTs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/unstructured-commands-mqtt.htm "Use this scenario to receive commands in the cloud and send responses to a device using the MQTTs protocol to interact with your Internet of Things (IoT) devices.")

#### Developer Tools

[REST APIs](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/iot/latest)

[Data API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/internet-of-things/data-api/index.html)

[Database schema](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/iot-domain-database-schema.htm "Use the Internet of Things (IoT) domain database schema to access the metadata and data from the digital twin resources associated with an IoT domain.")

[IoT CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/iot.html)

[SDKs and CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Java Samples](https://github.com/oracle-samples/oci-iot-samples/tree/main/samples/java)

[IoT MCP server](https://github.com/oracle/mcp/tree/main/src/oci-iot-mcp-server)

#### Consume your Data

[Oracle Application Express (APEX)](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/connect-iot-apex.htm "To use Oracle Application Express (APEX) with your Internet of Things (IoT) data follow these steps to configure access and connect your data.")

[Oracle REST Data Services (ORDS)](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/connect-iot-ords.htm "If you want to use Oracle REST Data Services (ORDS) to view your Internet of Things data, follow these steps to configure access to use ORDS.")

[Direct Database Connection](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/connect-database.htm "This scenario shows how to configure access to establish a direct connection to the IoT database. Each IoT domain group uses a dedicated database instance, that's shared by all IoT domains in that domain group.")

[Oracle Analytics Cloud](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/connect-analytics-cloud.htm "Configure access to view your Internet of Things (IoT) data in Oracle Analytics Cloud.")

#### Support

[Troubleshooting](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/internet-of-things/troubleshooting.htm "Use troubleshooting information to identify and address common issues that can occur when working with your Internet of Things (IoT) Platform.")

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/signin)

#### Community

[GitHub](https://github.com/oracle-samples/oci-iot-samples)

# Big Data Service

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Big Data Service
================

Big Data Service provisions fully configured, secure, highly available, and dedicated Hadoop and Spark clusters on demand. Scale the cluster to fit your big data and analytics workloads by using a range of Oracle Cloud Infrastructure compute shapes that support small test and development clusters to large production clusters.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/big-data/)

#### Get Started

[Learn about Big Data Service](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/overview.htm "Big Data Service provides enterprise-grade Hadoop as a service, with end-to-end security, high performance, and ease of management and upgradeability.")

[Review a typical workflow](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/get-started-workflow.htm "Describes the steps to start using Big Data Service.")

[Watch an overview video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CAmaIGKkEIE)

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/big-data/big-data-service/)

#### Prerequisites

[Allow Big Data to access resources](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/policies-create.htm "Create a policy using the Console.")

[Set up a network](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/get-started-network.htm "Before you can create and use Big Data Service clusters, you must create and configure a network. Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Networking service provides a wide range of features for establishing a secure networking topology for your Big Data Service.")

#### Developer Tools

[Big Data CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/bds.html)

[Big Data API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/bigdata/latest)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Community

[Big Data blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/bigdata/)

[Big Data forum (requires subscription)](https://cloudcustomerconnect.oracle.com/resources/55789f3be1/summary)

[Big Data products and solutions](https://www.oracle.com/big-data/big-data-service/)

#### Create Clusters

[Plan your clusters](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/get-started-cluster-plan.htm "Before creating Big Data Service clusters, you must plan and understand clusters, instance types and shapes, and cluster profiles.")

[Create a cluster](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/manage-cluster-create.htm "Create a cluster in Big Data Service.")

[Add nodes](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/scale-cluster-add-worker-nodes.htm "When you add worker, compute only worker, master, utility, or edge nodes to a Big Data Service cluster, you expand both compute and storage. The new nodes use the same instance shape and amount of block storage as the existing worker nodes in the cluster.")

[Restart nodes](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/manage-cluster-restart-node.htm "You can restart a single node of a cluster from the Big Data Service Cluster details page.")

#### Visualize Cluster Data

[Using JupyterHub](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/notebooks-jupyterhub.htm "JupyterHub lets multiple users work together by providing an individual Jupyter notebook server for each user. When you create a Big Data Service cluster, JupyterHub is installed and configured on the cluster nodes.")

#### Manage Clusters

[Use Apache Ambari](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/hadoop-odh-open.htm "Access Apache Ambari.")

[Use Apache Hue](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/hadoop-odh-hue.htm "Apache Hue is a web-based query editor.")

[Set up front ends with load balancers](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/get-started-cluster-load-balancer.htm "The Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Load Balancing service provides automated traffic distribution from one entry point to multiple backend servers. You can use a load balancer with Big Data Service to provide the entry point for accessing services such as Apache Ambari. Hue, and JupyterHub (the Big Data Service notebook application).")

#### Troubleshooting

[Troubleshoot Big Data Service](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/troubleshooting.htm "Use troubleshooting information to identify and address common issues that can occur while working with Big Data Service clusters.")

#### Support

[Increase service limits for Big Data](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/bigdata/overview.htm#request-increase)

[Get help and contact support](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

Management Agent
================

Management Agents provide low latency interactive communication and data collection between Oracle Cloud Infrastructure and any other targets.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/management-agent)

# Network Firewall

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Network Firewall
================

The Network Firewall service is a next-generation managed firewall and intrusion detection and prevention service for a Oracle Cloud Infrastructure virtual cloud network (VCN).

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/network-firewall/index.htm)

#### Get Started

[Overview of the Network Firewall service](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/network-firewall/overview.htm)

[Setting Up the Network Firewall Service](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/setting-up-the-network-firewall-service.htm "Learn how to set up the Network Firewall service.")

[Overview of Creating a Firewall](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/setting-up-network-firewall.htm "Learn how to create a firewall in the Network Firewall service.")

#### Firewalls

[Creating and Managing Firewalls](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/managing-firewalls.htm "Learn how to create and manage firewalls.")

[Logging Firewall Activity](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/logs.htm "Learn how to improve your network security using firewall logs.")

[Monitoring Firewalls](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/metrics.htm "Monitor the health, capacity, and performance of your firewalls by using metrics, alarms, and notifications.")

[Create a Firewall](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/firewall-create.htm "Use the Network Firewall service to create a firewall.")

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Firewall policies

[Creating and Managing Firewall Policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/policies.htm "Create firewall policies to store the firewall policy rules you create to control how a firewall inspects, allows, or denies network traffic.")

[Create a Firewall Policy](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/create-nfw-policy.htm "Create a firewall policy that you can associate with a firewall. Firewall policies contain the rules that control how the firewall inspects, allows, or denies network traffic.")

[Creating Components for Firewall Policy Rules](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/creating-annd-managing-firewall-policy-rule-components.htm "Components help you build firewall policy rules. When the policy is associated with a firewall, the firewall uses the rules to process network traffic.")

[Add a Decryption Rule to a Firewall Policy](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/decryption-rule-create.htm "Decryption rules contain a set of criteria against which a network packet is matched and decrypted.")

[Add a Security Rule to a Firewall Policy](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/security-rule-create.htm "Security rules contain a set of criteria against which a network packet is matched and then allowed or blocked.")

[Add a Tunnel Inspection Rule to a Firewall Policy](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/tunnel-inspection-rule-create.htm "Tunnel inspection rules contain a set of criteria against which a network packet is matched and then inspected.")

[Add a NAT Rule to a Firewall Policy](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/add_nat_rules_to_a_firewall_policy.htm "NAT rules contain a set of criteria against which a network packet is matched for source address translation (NAT).")

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Mapped secrets and decryption

[Setting Up Network Traffic Decryption and Inspection](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/setting-up-certificate-authentication.htm "Install the certificate and private key needed to decrypt and inspect TLS traffic.")

[Create a Mapped Secret](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/mapped-secret-create.htm "Create mapped secrets to use in decryption profiles to decrypt and inspect SSL/TLS traffic with SSL forward proxy or SSL inbound inspection.")

[Create a Decryption Profile](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/network-firewall/decryption-profile-create.htm "Create decryption profiles to control how SSL forward proxy and SSL inbound inspection perform session mode checks, server checks, and failure checks. You can create a maximum of 500 decryption profiles in each policy.")

#### Developer tools

[NetworkFirewall Reference](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/network-firewall/latest/NetworkFirewall/)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Troubleshooting

[Troubleshooting network firewall](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/network-firewall/troubleshooting.htm)

# Oracle Cloud Migrations

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Oracle Cloud Migrations
=======================

The Oracle Cloud Migrations service automates the migration of virtual machines from on-premises environments to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). Using a simple managed connection with your data center, you can discover assets capable of migrating, group source workloads into migration projects, schedule data replication, and launch the migrated virtual machines to OCI.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/cloud-migration/index.htm)

#### Get Started

[Learn about Oracle Cloud Migrations](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-overview.htm "The Oracle Cloud Migrations service provides an end-to-end, comprehensive self-service experience for migrating VMware virtual machines and Amazon Web Services (AWS) EC2 instances to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) compute.")

[Get started with Oracle Cloud Migrations](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-get-started.htm "Review the prerequisites for using Oracle Cloud Migrations service and how to get started with the Oracle Cloud Migrations service.")

[Create IAM policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-ocm-iam-policies.htm "Create Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies to control who has access to Oracle Cloud Migrations (OCM) resources, and to control the type of access for each group of users.")

[Migration workflow](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-get-started.htm#cloud-migration-using-ocm-service "To use the Oracle Cloud Migrations for migrating your virtual machines (VMs) from on-premises to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), here's what you can do:")

#### Remote Agent Appliances

[Configure networking ports and protocols](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-remote-agent-appliance.htm#cloud-migration-remote-agent-connectivity-vmware "The remote agent appliance is distributed as a sealed virtual machine that requires IPv4 addresses to operate, which can be statically assigned or assigned using Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol (DHCP).")

[Install remote agent appliances](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-install-remote-agent-appliance.htm "Install a remote agent appliance to connect with an external environment.")

[Register remote agent appliances](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-register-remote-agent-appliance.htm "Register the remote agent appliance with a source environment.")

#### Migration Projects

[Create migration projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-create-migration-project-outline.htm "Create a migration project including an initial migration plan and inventory assets.")

[Create replication schedule](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-create-replication-schedule.htm "Create schedules for the migration projects to perform replications for all the associated migration assets.")

[Add migration assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-add-assets.htm "Add assets to a migration project using the Oracle Cloud Migrations inventory. You can add only those assets that are not associated with any other migration projects.")

[Replicate migration assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-perform-manual-replication.htm "Replicate a migration asset manually.")

[Complete migration projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-validate-complete-migration.htm "Mark a migration project as complete after migrating it to the target environment and validating the migration assets.")

#### Source Environments

[Create environments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-create-environment.htm "Create a source environment within Oracle Cloud Migrations as the first step for discovery and migration.")

[Rename environments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-rename-environment.htm "Rename an active environment in the Oracle Cloud Migrations service.")

#### External Asset Discovery

[Create asset sources](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-create-asset-source.htm "Learn how to create an asset source in an Oracle Cloud Migrations environment.")

[Run external asset discovery](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-run-discovery.htm "After creating an asset source, run the Oracle Cloud Migrations external asset discovery.")

[Update asset sources](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-edit-asset-source.htm "Update the asset source information in Oracle Cloud Migrations.")

[Delete asset sources](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-delete-asset-source.htm "Delete an asset source in the Oracle Cloud Migrations service.")

#### Migration Plans

[Create migration plans](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-create-migration-plan.htm "Create a migration plan to test different configurations, compare cost models, and so on.")

[Configure target assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-configure-target-asset.htm "Configure a target asset for migration.")

[Generate a Resource Manager stack](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-estimate-cost-execute-migration-plan.htm "Generate a Resource Manager stack from a migration plan by using the OCI Resource Manager.")

[Deploy a Resource Manager stack](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-deploy-rms-console.htm "Deploy an RMS that applies the stack on the migration plan to create VM instances.")

[Export and import migration plans](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-import-export-migration-plans.htm "Modify target assets in bulk using a CSV file.")

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Agent Dependencies

[Create agent dependencies for an environment](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-create-agent-dependency-environment.htm "Create an agent dependency for a specific environment in Oracle Cloud Migrations.")

#### Inventory Assets

[View inventory assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-view-assets-inventory.htm "View the details of the inventory assets in Oracle Cloud Migrations.")

[Import assets for inventory](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-import-assets-inventory.htm "Import assets from CSV files instead of setting up a source environment. However, if you import assets, you can't take advantage of the automated discovery and replication modules.")

[Search inventory assets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/cloud-migration-search-assets-inventory.htm "Use filters and other queries to search for discovered inventory assets.")

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Developer Tools

[Cloud Bridge API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/OCB/latest/)

[Cloud Bridge CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/cloud-bridge.html)

[Cloud Migrations API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/ocm/latest/)

[Cloud Migrations CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/cloud-migrations.html)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

# Ops Insights

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/operations-insights/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Ops Insights
============

Ops Insights provides comprehensive information about the resource use and capacity of databases and hosts. Use this service to analyze CPU and storage resources, forecast capacity issues, and proactively identify SQL performance issues across a database fleet.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/operations-insights/)

#### Get Started

[Concepts](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/operations-insights.html)

[Demo mode](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/explore-operations-insights-using-demo-mode.html)

[Policy details](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/policy-details-ops-insights.html)

[LiveLabs: Learn Ops Insights](https://apexapps.oracle.com/pls/apex/r/dbpm/livelabs/view-workshop?wid=3307)

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/manageability/operations-insights/)

#### Configure Agent-Managed Resources

[Perform agent prerequisites](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/prerequisites-enabling-resources.html#GUID-853EF638-94FE-44DC-BC29-116EB068E736__GUID-B3465780-7EC1-435B-A07A-2DBAC3E7A305)

[Create external handles](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Database/Tasks/externalcreating.htm)

[Enable databases](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/enable-databases-service.html)

[Enable hosts](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/enable-hosts-service.html)

#### Database Analytics

[SQL Insights](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/sql-insights.html)

[Automatic Database Diagnostic Monitor (ADDM) Spotlight](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/addm-spotlight.html)

[Analyze Automatic Workload Repository (AWR) Hub data](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/use-awr-hub.html)

#### Configure Cloud Resources

[Enable Autonomous AI Database Full Feature](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/autonomous-database-full-feature-support.html)

[Perform prerequisites and enable Cloud resources](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/enabling-database-cloud-service-databases-and-exadata-systems.html)

#### Configure Data Warehouses

[Automatic Workload Repository (AWR) Hub](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/analyze-automatic-workload-repository-awr-performance-data.html)

#### Visualize and Report

[Get SQL performance statistics](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/sql-explorer-intro.html)

[Explore Data Objects](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/data-object-sql-explorer.html)

#### Community

[Customer Advisory Board](https://docs.oracle.com/en/enterprise-manager/emcab/index.html)

#### Configure Enterprise Manager Managed Resources

[Perform prerequisites](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/prerequisites-enabling-resources.html)

[Enable databases, hosts, and Exadata systems](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/operations-insights/doc/adding-enterprise-manager-targets.html)

# Fleet Application Management

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Fleet Application Management
============================

Fleet Application Management provides centralized operations across your entire cloud footprint—enabling IT automation, resource management, and patch compliance at scale for any technology deployed on OCI.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/fleet-management/)

#### Get Started

[Learn about Fleet Application Management](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/overview.htm "Fleet Application Management simplifies the management of system life cycles and the operation of resources deployed on OCI. Fleet Application Management provides a centralized platform to automate tasks, validate compliance, and enhance operational efficiency across an enterprise.")

[Requirements and access](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/requirements-access.htm "Before you get started with Fleet Application Management, you must meet target machine requirements, complete prerequisite tasks, and ensure that access has been granted.")

[Onboarding process](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/onboard.htm "Start Fleet Application Management by onboarding the service.")

[Product Page](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/fleet-application-management/)

#### Administer

[Metadata information](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/metadata-management.htm "Metadata management is the administration of metadata within Fleet Application Management. It involves creating products, product stacks, environment types, patch types, credential names, lifecycle operations, and adding central host instances to maintain, integrate, access, share, and analyze information effectively.")

[Properties](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/properties.htm "Manage and define global elements to be used as properties for different types of fleets in Fleet Application Management.")

[Patches](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/manage-patches.htm "Manage software patches to enhance and fix vulnerabilities of products in Fleet Application Management.")

[Settings](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/settings.htm "Configure the frequency of software discovery on resources, find information about the service's version, and an option to opt out of Fleet Application Management.")

#### Developer Tools

[Fleet Application Management API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/fleet-management/latest/)

[Fleet Application Management CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/fleet-apps-management.html)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Provision Resources

[Marketplace catalog items](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/using-marketplace-catalog.htm "Use Marketplace catalog items managed by Fleet Application Management for your tenancy to help with infrastructure resource deployments.")

[Private catalog items](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/using-private-catalog.htm "Provision resources using private catalog items in Fleet Application Management.")

[Deployed resources](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/deploy-resources.htm "Deploying resources means running a Terraform package in Fleet Application Management using a runbook task.")

#### Manage

[Create a private catalog item](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/create-private-catalog.htm "Create your private catalog items by specifying the configuration details, resource types, and deployment steps required to provision a particular set of OCI resources in Fleet Application Management. When you create a catalog item, its version gets an active status automatically.")

[Create a fleet](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/create-fleet.htm "Group resources dynamically or manually to create a fleet in Fleet Application Management.")

[Create a runbook](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/create-runbook.htm "Create a custom runbook in Fleet Application Management by using the visual designer.")

[Create a runbook task](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/create-runbook-task.htm "Create a runbook task for performing lifecycle operations on a fleet in Fleet Application Management.")

[Get compliance details of a fleet](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/get-compliance-detail.htm "Get the compliance details for a fleet in Fleet Application Management.")

[Upload a custom patch](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/upload-custom-patch.htm "Upload a custom patch to Object Storage. Uploaded patches can be applied to relevant resource targets or product homes in Fleet Application Management.")

[Fix a fleet to be compliant](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/compliant-fix.htm "Configure runbook tasks and parameters for noncompliant fleets in Fleet Application Management.")

[Create a maintenance window](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/create-maintenance-window.htm "Create a maintenance window in Fleet Application Management. When you create a maintenance window, it's automatically assigned an active status.")

[Create a lifecycle operation schedule](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/create-lifecycle-operation-schedule.htm "Create a schedule to perform lifecycle operations daily or monthly in Fleet Application Management based on the release of patches.")

[Work with reports](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/reports.htm "View detailed and configurable reports to track and analyze various operational metrics across environments, runbooks, compliance, and schedules in Fleet Application Management.")

#### Community

[Fleet Application Management blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/post/oci-fleet-application-management-ga)

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Use Cases

[Onboard and patch a custom product](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/add-custom-product-patch.htm "As an application owner, I want to add a third-party software, such as Apache Tomcat, to Fleet Application Management and patch it.")

[Patch a supported product](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/patch-supported-product.htm "As an application owner, I want to patch the Oracle Clusterware and Oracle Base Database Service products that Fleet Application Management supports.")

[Patch by using a self-hosted instance](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/patch-using-self-hosted-instance.htm "As an organization, I want to automate OS patching for Oracle Base Database Service DBNode resources by using a self-hosted instance with Fleet Application Management.")

[Provision an application footprint](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/provision-using-private-catalog.htm "As an organization, I want to provision or resize an application footprint across several environments, including development, testing, staging, and production through Fleet Application Management. ​ Each environment requires specific resource sizing, allocation, and tier-based configurations such as, web tier, application tier, database tier. Resources must be named and tagged appropriately for easy identification and management.")

#### Troubleshooting

[Patch application failing](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/troubleshoot.htm#patch-failure "Troubleshoot Fleet Application Management that's failing to apply patches to resources that are modified.")

[Unreachable resources are part of the schedule](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/troubleshoot.htm#terminated-resources-removal "Troubleshoot Fleet Application Management where stopped or terminated OCI Compute and Oracle AI Database resources still appear in the lifecycle operation schedule.")

[Lifecycle operation jobs failing](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/troubleshoot.htm#job-run-fails "Troubleshoot Fleet Application Management where a lifecycle operation job didn't run at the stipulated time.")

[Identification of Oracle WebLogic Application Server targets failing](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/fleet-management/troubleshoot.htm#troubleshooting_weblogic_targets_identification "Troubleshoot Fleet Application Management where it can't identify the Oracle WebLogic Server targets.")

#### Support

[Get help and contact Support](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

[Use support chat in the Console](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/support/getting-help.htm#livechat)

# Access Governance

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Access Governance
=================

Access Governance is a cloud service that provides visibility into access rights across both cloud and on-premises environments, and across infrastructure and applications. It helps administrators to automate access provisioning, analyze access permissions, manage access policies, identify anomalies, and remediate security risks.

[What's New](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/whats-new.htm "Here’s an overview of new features released, including documentation updates.")

#### Get Started

[Before you begin](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/before-you-begin.htm)

[Set up users](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/set-up-users.htm)

[Set up roles](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/about-application-roles.htm "Oracle Access Governance offers several predefined application roles with different capabilities levels to perform the access management and governance operations. You can assign one or more application roles to users from your Oracle Access Governance cloud service instance. You can’t modify predefined application roles or modify permissions assigned within these roles.")

#### Administer

[Set up service instance](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/set-up-service-instance.htm "You can create an Oracle Access Governance instance in the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Console. The steps below show you how to create an instance and verify its operation.")

[Manage service instance](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/manage-service-instance.htm "You can manage an Oracle Access Governance instance in the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Console. The steps below show you how to perform management tasks on your service instance using the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Console.")

[Manage identities](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/manage-identities.htm)

[Manage global key-values](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/manage-global-key-values.htm)

#### Support

[Learn about support requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a support request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Access Controls

[Create an identity collection](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/create-identity-collections.htm "Identity Collections are groups of identities based on shared attributes or named identities. Identity collections comprise identities that have been on boarded from integrated systems using identity orchestration.")

[Create an access bundle](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/bundle-create-access-bundle.htm "An Access Bundle is a collection of permissions that package access to resources, application features, and functionality into a requestable unit. Each access bundle can be associated with only one orchestrated system.")

[Create a policy](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/manage-policies.htm#create-a-policy "You can create a policy in the Oracle Access Governance Console by following the steps below:")

[Create a role](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/manage-roles.htm#create-a-role "You can create a role in the Oracle Access Governance Console by following the steps below:")

#### Self Service

[View access details](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/view-access-details-and-manage-account.htm "As an Oracle Access Governance user, you can view your own accesses from the My Stuff, and then My Access page. You can view comprehensive details on granted roles, permissions, accounts, ownership, organizations, identity collections, identity attributes, cloud resources, and policies. You can also change your account password if the account is provisioned within Oracle Access Governance.")

[Request access](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/request-access.htm "As an Oracle Access Governance WORKFORCE user, you can request access to resources and roles for yourself or others. Your request may be granted automatically if no approval is required, or it may go through an approval process.")

[Manage approvals](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/manage-approvals.htm "You can manage your approvals using the Oracle Access Governance Console.")

[Manage delegation preferences](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/manage-delegation-preferences.htm "Delegation preferences allow you to setup and manage a delegate for certain tasks and activities in Oracle Access Governance in the event that you are unable to carry out the task, for example due to absence from the office.")

#### Developer Tools

[REST API](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/paas/access-governance/restapi.html)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Integrate

[Orchestration overview](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/identity-orchestration-overview.htm "Identity Orchestration is an Oracle Access Governance framework that brings together diverse Authoritative and Managed Systems by supporting low-code integrations. It facilitates data transformations and correlation rules which ensures data coherence, extracts the required identity data from various systems into Oracle Access Governance, and performs fulfillment through account provisioning.")

[Manage integrations](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/manage-integrations-with-orchestrated-system.htm "Using Orchestrated System of Oracle Access Governance, you can perform integrations with other systems by adding an orchestrated system, modify the connection settings, validate and load the data in Oracle Access Governance.")

[Configure settings](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/configure-settings-for-an-orchestrated-system.htm "With Oracle Access Governance, you can configure an orchestrated system by editing the integration settings, configuring notification settings, transforming inbound and outbound data for identity and account attributes, and applying matching or correlation rules to ensure integrated components work seamlessly together.")

[Supported integrations](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/supported-integrations-in-oracle-access-governance.htm "Oracle Access Governance offers a various specialized and generic integrations. Specialized integrations involve integrations for specific applications, providing application-specific use cases whereas Generic integrations are commonly used when you want to integrate constrained or sensitive applications, or for applications with unsupported data structures. The connections can be direct, which is API-based, or indirect which are Agent-based.")

#### Access Reviews

[Create identity review campaigns](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/create-identity-access-review-campaigns.htm "As an Administrator or Campaign Administrator, certify identity accesses by creating on-demand Identity Access Review campaigns from the Oracle Access Governance Console. These can be one-time or periodic access review campaigns.")

[Create policy review campaigns](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/create-policy-review-campaigns.htm "As an Administrator or Campaign Administrator, certify policies by creating on-demand Policy Review campaigns from the Oracle Access Governance Console. These can be one-time or periodic policy review campaigns.")

[Create event-based reviews](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/access-governance/configure-and-manage-event-based-access-reviews.htm "You can perform micro certifications in Oracle Access Governance using the Event-Based Access Reviews. You can configure one or more predefined event types, which when triggered, creates the access reviews automatically. You can select to automatically approve the low-risk items, or reviewers can certify, that's accept or revoke accesses associated with the event.")

#### Reference

[Tutorials](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/paas/access-governance/tutorials.html)

[Videos](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/paas/access-governance/videos.html)

[Integrations exchange](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/iga-integrations-exchange/)

# Gen 1 Cloud at Customer Documentation - Gen 1 Oracle Cloud at Customer

[Go to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/index.html#)

 Search

![](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/sp_common/shared-images/4-cloud.png)

1.  [Home](https://docs.oracle.com/index.html)
    
2.  [Cloud](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/index.html)
    
3.  [Cloud at Customer](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/index.html)
    

Gen 1 Cloud at Customer Documentation
=====================================

Gen 1 Cloud at Customer brings the power of Oracle Cloud to your data center.

Learn about key new features in [**What's New for Gen 1 Oracle Cloud at Customer**](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occwo/index.html)
 or use the [Books page](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/books.html)
 to view a list of the books that are specific to Gen 1 Cloud at Customer.

See the [Oracle Cloud at Customer web site](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/cloud-at-customer.html)
 for more information.

### Prepare for Delivery

If you've already ordered a subscription to Gen 1 Oracle Cloud at Customer and you're waiting for delivery, then review the [Customer Deployment Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-deploy/)
.

### Learn How Oracle Manages the Cloud in Your Data Center

While Oracle installs the hardware and configures your Oracle Cloud software, learn how Oracle manages your Gen 1 Cloud at Customer environment and how you can manage your new Oracle Cloud Account and the day-to-day work of your team.

*   [Initial Configuration and Setup](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/initial-configuration-and-setup.html)
    
*   [Day-to-Day Systems Management](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/day-day-systems-management.html)
    
*   [Oracle Cloud Account Management](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/managing-your-oracle-cloud-account.html)
    

### Get Started with Your Gen 1 Cloud at Customer Account

After Oracle sets up your Gen 1 Cloud at Customer environment in your data center, the Oracle personnel on site will hand off the environment to you.

*   [Learn Universal Credits on Gen 1 Cloud at Customer](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/universal-credits-cloud-customer.html)
    
*   [Learn About Your Gen 1 Cloud at Customer Data Region](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/your-cloud-customer-data-region.html)
    
*   [Sign In to Your Gen 1 Cloud at Customer Account with Universal Credits](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/sign-your-cloud-customer-account.html)
    
*   [Get Started with Your Gen 1 Cloud at Customer Account](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/get-started-your-cloud-customer-account.html)
    
*   [Monitor Your Universal Credits Usage](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/monitor-your-usage-and-universal-credits-balance-oracle-cloud-customer.html)
    
*   [Create and Manage Users in Your Gen 1 Cloud at Customer Account](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/create-and-manage-oracle-cloud-customer-users.html)
    
*   [Get Started with IaaS and PaaS Services on Gen 1 Cloud at Customer](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/occ-get-started/getting-started-iaas-and-paas-services.html)
    

### Services Available on Gen 1 Oracle Cloud at Customer

You can run a variety of Oracle Cloud services in your Gen 1 Oracle Cloud at Customer environment. For example:

**Gen 1 Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Services**

*   [Compute Classic](http://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/iaas/compute-iaas-cloud/index.html)
    
*   [Load Balancing Classic](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/iaas/load-balancer-cloud/index.html)
    
*   [Storage Classic](http://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/iaas/storage-cloud/index.html)
    

**Gen 1 Oracle Platform Cloud Services**

*   [Oracle Java Cloud Service](http://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/paas/java-cloud/index.html)
    
*   [Oracle Cloud Stack Manager](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/paas/cloud-stack-manager/index.html)
    
*   [Oracle Database Cloud Service](http://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/paas/database-dbaas-cloud/index.html)
    

For a complete list of the services currently available for Gen 1 Cloud at Customer, see [Services Available on Gen 1 Oracle Cloud at Customer](https://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=en/cloud/cloud-at-customer&id=GSOCM-GUID-E134A452-3C99-4D21-8728-074B5CD0E3B8)
.

### Additional Resources

See the [Gen 1 Cloud at Customer Documentation page](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/books.html)
 for a complete list books.

If you are looking for information on other Cloud at Customer products, see [Oracle Big Data Cloud Service](http://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/paas/big-data-cloud/index.html)
, which incorporates Oracle Big Data Cloud at Customer.

Exadata Cloud at Customer
-------------------------

### Looking for Gen 2 Exadata Cloud at Customer?

Gen 2 is the latest generation of Oracle Database Exadata Cloud at Customer, which enables you to apply the combined power of Exadata and [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure](https://docs.cloud.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Concepts/baremetalintro.htm)
 inside your own data center.

Access the latest documentation for [Exadata Cloud at Customer Gen 2](https://docs.oracle.com/en/engineered-systems/exadata-cloud-at-customer/)
.

### Looking for the Latest on Gen 1 Exadata Cloud at Customer?

Gen 1 is the first generation of Oracle Database Exadata Cloud at Customer, which is deployed in conjunction with [Oracle Cloud at Customer](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/index.html#CloudatCustomer)
.

Access the latest documentation for [Gen 1 Exadata Cloud at Customer](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/exadata-cloud-at-customer/)
, or go directly to the [Administration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/exadata-cloud-at-customer/exacc/this-service.html)
.

[Back to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/cloud-at-customer/index.html#)
